title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin presents a multi-model workflow that routes planning and reasoning tasks to Claude Opus while delegating frontend design to Gemini 3.5 Flash. The approach leverages each model's strengths: Opus for strategic planning and integration logic, Gemini for visual design and code generation, reducing costs while improving output quality for full-stack applications.
